name: Fennel Nicoise
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the fennel and cut each head into quarters.
2. Boil in salted water for 10 minutes, then drain very well.
3. Chop the onions and garlic finely.
4. Heat the oil and sauté them until they are golden and soft.
5. Add the fennel and stir over low heat.
6. Skin the tomatoes, remove the seeds, chop the flesh roughly and add to the sauté mixture.
7. Add the wine, thyme, salt, and pepper. Stir well, cover, and simmer for 1 hour.
8. Transfer to a serving dish and chill before serving.
